Priya Raman is a Freelance Full-Stack Developer based in Gurugram, India, reachable at
priya.raman@proton.me or +44 786982477. Priya is a freelance full-stack developer who has spent the

person founders call at 2 a.m. when the payment webhook breaks, and the one who calmly rewrites the
whole thing the next morning.
Currently, as a Senior Full-Stack Developer at QuantLeap AI (2024  Present), Priya owned the full
SDLC for 7 client projects from design to production; built REST and GraphQL APIs with 97% test
coverage and automated CI/CD; and integrated payments and reduced checkout drop-off by 52% using

processing time by 33% through profiling and targeted optimization; collaborated with product and
design to deliver 3 customer-facing features per quarter; and resolved 70+ production incidents with
rapid root-cause analysis and post-mortems. Earlier, as a MERN Stack Developer at Adobe (2017 
2021), she mentored 12 junior engineers on PostgreSQL and modern engineering best practices;
automated repetitive workflows with Next.js, saving the team 4 hours per week; and improved
automated test coverage to 98% by introducing MongoDB-based test suites.
On the technical side Priya works with React, AWS, Docker, MongoDB, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Next.js
and tRPC. She holds a B.Sc Computer Science from NIT Trichy, graduating in 2015 with a CGPA of
9.0/10. She is certified as HashiCorp Terraform Associate, Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900),
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA). Along the way she has been recognised  recipient of the
'Star Performer' award for two consecutive quarters; and promoted ahead of cycle for outstanding
technical contributions.
Selected projects include: QueryQuill: a side project using React/AWS to classifies support tickets;
covered the full lifecycle from design and data modeling to deployment and monitoring. NimbusDeploy:
an open-source React project (300+ GitHub stars) that recommends content for developers; maintained
issues, reviewed community PRs and wrote documentation. Outside of work, Priya enjoys playing the
guitar, badminton.
